description: An ICE designed evidence-collage graphic on a mottled dark-blue background, styled as scattered white-bordered Polaroid/instant snapshots with handwritten-style captions in a casual marker font. Three angled photos: (top-left, large) a current portrait/booking photo of a bearded Black man in a shirt, tie and vest captioned 'IAN ANDRE ROBERTS SEPT. 26, 2025'; (top-right) a close-up evidence photo of a black semi-automatic handgun in a holster lying on dark fabric, captioned 'LOADED HANDGUN FOUND IN VEHICLE SEPT. 26, 2025'; (bottom-right) an older gray-background police mugshot of the same man with longer hair, captioned 'IAN ANDRE ROBERTS FEBRUARY 2020.' Lower-left bears the DHS/ICE seal with 'ICE,' a red banner reading 'LEARN MORE,' and the URL 'ICE.gov/newsroom.' The tweet identifies Roberts as the arrested Des Moines Public Schools superintendent, 'a criminal illegal alien from Guyana,' caught with a loaded handgun, cash and a knife. The scrapbook collage technique juxtaposes a respectable-looking subject with a weapon and a prior mugshot to construct a menacing 'criminal alien' narrative; intent is to publicize an enforcement win and reinforce the dangerous-immigrant framing for a public/supporter audience.
notable_text: IAN ANDRE ROBERTS SEPT. 26, 2025; LOADED HANDGUN FOUND IN VEHICLE; IAN ANDRE ROBERTS FEBRUARY 2020; ICE LEARN MORE ICE.gov/newsroom
